name: Deli-Style Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces salami, dry, thinly sliced julienne
1 small zucchini, halved and sliced thin
1/4 cup cider or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions: Cook the pasta according to package directions; rinse in cold water and drain. Place in a large bowl; add the next nine ingredients. In a jar with tight-fitting lid, combine oil, vinegar, garlic, mustard, basil, oregano, salt, and pepper; shake well. Pour over salad; toss to coat. Cover and chill for 8 hours or overnight. Toss before serving. Garnish with tomatoes.
